rule.name: Capacitor/Cordova Insecure HTTP Endpoint Usage
rule.rule_desc: Detects cleartext endpoint references in hybrid mobile application code/configuration.
rule.vuln_desc: Using HTTP can expose traffic to interception and tampering.
rule.developer: Use HTTPS for all production APIs and enforce certificate validation.
rule.reviewer: Review endpoint configurations and block cleartext transport in production. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Insecure Browser Plugin Usage
rule.rule_desc: Detects embedded browser opening flows that need URL allowlist validation.
rule.vuln_desc: Opening attacker-controlled URLs can lead to phishing and token leakage.
rule.developer: Allowlist destinations and validate any dynamic URL input.
rule.reviewer: Confirm URL validation and navigation restrictions are enforced. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Sensitive Data in Local Storage
rule.rule_desc: Detects local storage write paths that may include sensitive data.
rule.vuln_desc: Persisting secrets in web storage can expose tokens/credentials on device compromise.
rule.developer: Store secrets in secure native storage plugins, not plain web storage.
rule.reviewer: Review storage key/value usage and verify sensitive data handling. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Ionic/Cordova Allow Navigation Wildcard
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard allowlists can expose app web context to untrusted content.
rule.developer: Restrict navigation/access allowlists to trusted origins.
rule.reviewer: Review config.xml allowlist entries and CSP alignment. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Ionic Insecure HTTP Endpoint Usage
rule.rule_desc: Detects cleartext endpoint references in Ionic/Capacitor apps.
rule.vuln_desc: Cleartext transport can leak sensitive traffic.
rule.developer: Use HTTPS and secure transport configuration.
rule.reviewer: Audit endpoint constants and environment config files. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Ionic/CSP Unsafe Directives
rule.rule_desc: Detects weak CSP directives often used in webview apps.
rule.vuln_desc: Unsafe CSP directives increase XSS/script injection exploitability.
rule.developer: Harden CSP and avoid unsafe directives whenever possible.
rule.reviewer: Review index.html/meta headers/CSP configuration files. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Ionic Capacitor Cleartext Permitted
rule.rule_desc: Detects platform transport relaxations in hybrid config.
rule.vuln_desc: Transport relaxations can permit insecure network communication.
rule.reviewer: Validate Android/iOS transport security configurations. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Ionic Storage Secret Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects potentially sensitive values stored in web storage.
rule.vuln_desc: Web storage is not suitable for long-lived secrets.
rule.developer: Use secure storage plugins and minimize client secret persistence.
rule.reviewer: Review client storage keys and data sensitivity. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Ionic Hardcoded Secret Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely hardcoded secrets in Ionic/Capacitor code.
rule.vuln_desc: Embedded secrets can be extracted from bundles/artifacts.
rule.developer: Move secrets server-side and rotate exposed credentials.
rule.reviewer: Verify no production secrets are committed. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Android Cleartext Traffic Allowed
rule.rule_desc: Detects Android cleartext traffic configuration in hybrid builds.
rule.vuln_desc: Cleartext transport weakens confidentiality and integrity guarantees.
rule.developer: Disable cleartext traffic and use secure network security config exceptions only when needed.
rule.reviewer: Check Android network policy for strict transport protection. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: iOS ATS Disabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects ATS disablement in hybrid iOS builds.
rule.vuln_desc: Disabling ATS can permit insecure transport and increase MITM risk.
rule.developer: Keep ATS enabled with narrow exceptions for approved domains only.
rule.reviewer: Review ATS keys in Info.plist and verify minimal exception scope. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
